title: Suet Delight
description: A sweet and juicy Tunisian dish featuring suet, prepared in a bhuna style that is kosher-friendly.
instructions: Mix suet and sugar in a bowl until well combined. Stir in ginger powder, cardamom seeds, and coriander seeds.
If using, add chopped pistachios to the mixture for added flavor and texture.
Gradually add milk or water while stirring with wooden spoon until smooth consistency is achieved.
Heat oil in a deep pan over medium heat. Pour the suet mix into hot oil and stir continuously until golden brown and crispy, about 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before shaping into desired form(s).
Return to preheated oven at 180°C for 3-5 minutes or until lightly toasted on all sides.
Serve warm with a sprinkle of chopped pistachios if used. Enjoy your Suet Delight!
